P

Persistance - package Persistance
 
Presentation - package Presentation
 
presentationToMall() - Method in class Presentation.UIManager
Displays a presentation message when the user enters the application.
Product - Class in Business.Products
Clase que guarda informació i atributs sobre els productes, també amb funcions bàsiques respectives.
Product(String) - Constructor for class Business.Products.Product
Constructor for creating a Product with only the name.
Product(String, String, String, float) - Constructor for class Business.Products.Product
Constructor for creating a Product with specified attributes.
Product(String, String, String, float, ArrayList<String>) - Constructor for class Business.Products.Product
Constructor for creating a Product with specified attributes, including reviews.
ProductApiDAO - Class in Persistance
The ProductApiDAO class provides data access functionality for managing product data using an API with JSON format.
ProductApiDAO() - Constructor for class Persistance.ProductApiDAO
Constructs a new ProductApiDAO and initializes the Gson instance.
ProductDAO - Interface in Persistance
The ProductDAO interface defines data access functionality for managing product data using JSON files.
ProductDeserializer - Class in Persistance
The ProductDeserializer class provides custom deserialization logic for adapting JSON objects to specific subclasses of the Product class based on the "category" field.
ProductDeserializer() - Constructor for class Persistance.ProductDeserializer
 
ProductGeneral - Class in Business.Products
The ProductGeneral class represents a general type of product with additional attributes such as a discount, extending the base Product class.
ProductGeneral(String, String, String, float, ArrayList<String>) - Constructor for class Business.Products.ProductGeneral
Constructor for creating a ProductGeneral with specified attributes.
productInAnyCatalogue(String) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Checks if a product exists in any shop's catalogue.
ProductJsonDAO - Class in Persistance
The ProductJsonDAO class provides data access functionality for managing product data using JSON files.
ProductJsonDAO() - Constructor for class Persistance.ProductJsonDAO
Constructs a new ProductJsonDAO with default values and initializes the Gson instance.
ProductManager - Class in Business
The `ProductManager` class manages operations related to products, including adding, correcting, and retrieving product information.
ProductManager() - Constructor for class Business.ProductManager
Constructs a `ProductManager` and initializes the associated `ProductJsonDAO` or `ProductApiDAO` based on availability and operability.
ProductReduced - Class in Business.Products
The ProductReduced class represents a specific type of product with additional attributes such as a discount, extending the base Product class.
ProductReduced(String, String, String, float, ArrayList<String>) - Constructor for class Business.Products.ProductReduced
Constructor for creating a ProductReduced with specified attributes.
ProductSuperReduced - Class in Business.Products
The ProductSuperReduced class represents a specific type of product with additional attributes such as a discount, extending the base Product class.
ProductSuperReduced(String, String, String, float, ArrayList<String>) - Constructor for class Business.Products.ProductSuperReduced
Constructor for creating a ProductSuperReduced with specified attributes.
